title: Attendance System - Full Stack Application
description: Attendance System is a full-stack education application developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient attendance management system for educational institutions with automated tracking, analytics, and reports. Handles 500+ users with 95% accuracy improvement and 70% reduction in administrative overhead.
longDescription: A resilient attendance management system for educational institutions: automated tracking, analytics, multi-institution deployment, React/Node/MongoDB, JWT, organization-scoped isolation.
impactMetric: 95% accuracy improvement, 70% reduction in administrative overhead, 500+ users.
problemSummary: automated attendance tracking and reporting at scale for schools.
detailedDescription: A resilient attendance management system architected for educational institutions to automate attendance tracking, provide comprehensive analytics, and generate detailed reports. The system handles 500+ active users across multiple institutions with 95% accuracy improvement and 70% reduction in administrative overhead. The architecture follows a three-tier design: React frontend, Node.js/Express API layer, and MongoDB database. Service isolation is achieved through Express route middleware, separating authentication, attendance tracking, and reporting logic. Database operations use MongoDB transactions for atomic updates, with connection pooling preventing connection exhaustion. The system supports multi-institution deployment through organization-scoped data isolation, with MongoDB indexing optimizing query performance for large datasets.
outcomes: 95% improvement in attendance tracking accuracy with automated systems, 70% reduction in administrative time through streamlined workflows. Comprehensive analytics and reporting capabilities with 15+ report types. Vision includes scaling to 10,000+ users through MongoDB sharding, Redis caching, and microservices extraction for analytics and notifications.
excerpt: Attendance System is a full-stack education application developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient attendance management system for educational institutions with automated tracking, analytics, and reports. Handles 500+ users with 95% accuracy improvement and 70% reduction in administrative overhead.

title: E-Learning Platform - Full Stack Application
displayTitle: E-Learning Platform: Sub-2s Loads for 10K+ Students
description: E-Learning Platform is an education learning management system developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient, scalable LMS for thousands of concurrent students and hundreds of courses, with sub-2-second page loads, course management, and real-time progress tracking.
longDescription: Resilient, scalable LMS for thousands of concurrent students and hundreds of courses: Django REST + React, PostgreSQL, sub-2-second page loads, JWT, horizontal scaling.
impactMetric: 10,000+ students, 500+ courses, sub-2s page loads, 99.9% uptime.
problemSummary: delivering online education at scale with consistent performance.
detailedDescription: A resilient, scalable learning management system architected to handle thousands of concurrent students and hundreds of courses. The platform enables educational institutions to deliver online education at scale with sub-2-second page loads, comprehensive course management, and real-time progress tracking. The system follows a layered architecture with Django REST Framework backend and React frontend. PostgreSQL serves as the primary relational database with optimized indexes. Django ORM uses select_related and prefetch_related to minimize database roundtrips. Service isolation is achieved through Django's app-based architecture, where course management, user authentication, and progress tracking are separated into distinct modules. The architecture supports horizontal scaling through Django's stateless design and PostgreSQL read replicas.
outcomes: Platform handles 10,000+ students and 500+ courses with consistent sub-2-second page load times. Stress-tested to handle 1,000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime. Optimized database queries reduce load times by 70% compared to baseline implementations. Vision includes scaling to 100,000+ students through Redis caching, CDN integration, and microservices extraction.
excerpt: E-Learning Platform is an education learning management system developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient, scalable LMS for thousands of concurrent students and hundreds of courses, with sub-2-second page loads, course management, and real-time progress tracking.

title: TaskForge - Modern Task & Project Management Platform - Full Stack Application
displayTitle: TaskForge: Real-Time Collaboration Without the Conflicts
description: TaskForge is a productivity and project management platform developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient, real-time collaborative platform for engineering teams with sub-second latency, conflict-free synchronization, and 100+ concurrent users per project.
longDescription: Resilient real-time collaborative project management: Next.js, Express, MongoDB, Socket.io, sub-500ms sync, 100+ concurrent users, optimistic UI, fault-tolerant design.
impactMetric: Sub-500ms latency, 100+ concurrent users per project, 99.9% uptime.
problemSummary: real-time team collaboration without stale data or edit conflicts.
featureList: Framer Motion and React Beautiful DnD
detailedDescription: TaskForge is a resilient, scalable real-time collaborative project management platform designed for engineering teams. The system handles concurrent collaboration across distributed teams, managing project workflows, task coordination, and team communication with sub-second latency and conflict-free synchronization. The platform supports real-time collaboration with sub-500ms latency and handles 100+ concurrent users per project without performance degradation. The architecture follows a microservices-inspired design with clear service boundaries, MongoDB for primary database with optimized indexing, pub-sub pattern via Socket.io for event distribution, and horizontal scaling through stateless API servers and MongoDB replica sets. Components are isolated through service boundaries, ensuring API failures don't block WebSocket communication, with automatic reconnection logic and exponential backoff for network resilience.
outcomes: Production-ready platform with 99.9% uptime, comprehensive error handling, and graceful reconnection strategies. Demonstrates enterprise-grade reliability with real-time collaboration capabilities, fault tolerance, and graceful degradation. Vision includes horizontal scaling to 10,000+ concurrent users through Redis pub-sub, read replicas, and CDN integration.
excerpt: TaskForge is a productivity and project management platform developed by Ancel Ajanga. A resilient, real-time collaborative platform for engineering teams with sub-second latency, conflict-free synchronization, and 100+ concurrent users per project.

title: EduChain - Blockchain Certificate Management
displayTitle: EduChain: Tamper-Proof Certificates on the Blockchain
description: EduChain is an education and blockchain application developed by Ancel Ajanga. ERC721 NFTs and IPFS decentralized storage power tamper-proof academic certificates on Ethereum. Hybrid storage: MongoDB, IPFS, and blockchain for verification.
longDescription: Decentralized certificate management: ERC721 NFTs on Ethereum, IPFS metadata, RainbowKit, Node/Express, MongoDB; instant verification and hybrid storage.
impactMetric: Tamper-proof certificates, instant verification, OpenZeppelin audited patterns.
problemSummary: verifiable, tamper-proof academic credentials without central authority.
detailedDescription: EduChain is a resilient, decentralized certificate management system architected on Web3 principles, issuing verifiable academic certificates as ERC721 NFTs on the Ethereum blockchain. The platform enables educational institutions to issue tamper-proof, blockchain-verified certificates while providing students with permanent, verifiable proof of achievements through hybrid storage (MongoDB + IPFS + Blockchain). The architecture follows a hybrid storage design: React 19 frontend with RainbowKit for wallet connection, Node.js/Express backend for certificate management, MongoDB for efficient querying, IPFS (via Pinata API) for decentralized metadata storage, and Ethereum blockchain (Sepolia testnet) for immutable certificate verification. Smart contracts use OpenZeppelin v5 ERC721 standard with ReentrancyGuard protection. Service isolation is achieved through separate layers: frontend wallet interactions are isolated from backend API calls, IPFS operations are handled asynchronously, and database operations use MongoDB transactions for atomic batch operations.
outcomes: Secure, decentralized solution for certificate management with instant verification capabilities. Uses OpenZeppelin audited patterns for security, includes dual storage (MongoDB for queries, IPFS for metadata, Blockchain for verification), and demonstrates production-grade Web3 architecture. Vision includes multi-chain deployment (Polygon, Arbitrum), certificate revocation mechanism, and enterprise features like institution-specific smart contracts.
excerpt: EduChain is an education and blockchain application developed by Ancel Ajanga. ERC721 NFTs and IPFS decentralized storage power tamper-proof academic certificates on Ethereum. Hybrid storage: MongoDB, IPFS, and blockchain for verification.

title: LedgerX - Finance Management Application
displayTitle: LedgerX: Double-Entry Ledgers That Audit Themselves
description: LedgerX is a finance management application developed by Ancel Ajanga. PostgreSQL financial correctness and multi-tenant isolation power this production-grade platform for invoicing, payments, double-entry accounting, audit, fraud detection, and diagnostics.
longDescription: Production-grade multi-tenant fintech: NestJS, PostgreSQL (Prisma), MongoDB logs, double-entry ledger with append-only hash chain, Stripe/M-Pesa, JWT, health/metrics/diagnostics.
impactMetric: Multi-tenant isolation, event-driven core, fraud signals, full auditability.
problemSummary: invoicing, payments, and accounting with strong auditability and correctness.
featureList: Double-entry ledger with append-only hash chain
detailedDescription: LedgerX is a production-grade, multi-tenant financial platform designed to handle invoicing, payments, accounting (double-entry ledger), audit/compliance, fraud detection, and system diagnostics in a single, cohesive system. Design goals: strong multi-tenant isolation (every request and query is organization-scoped), auditability by default (important actions are events and recorded), financial correctness (payments reflected in a true double-entry ledger with append-only hash chain), resilience under failure (circuit breakers, graceful degradation), operational visibility (health, metrics, diagnostics, feature flags, controlled remediation), and security that earns respect (JWT + refresh, token versioning, rate limiting, role-restricted audit/diagnostics). Backend: NestJS, PostgreSQL (Prisma), MongoDB (activity logs). Frontend: Next.js 14 App Router, React 18, TanStack Query. Payments: Stripe and M-Pesa adapters, idempotent intents, verified webhooks. Deployed on Render (backend) and Netlify (frontend).
outcomes: Production-grade multi-tenant fintech with event-driven core, double-entry ledger, fraud signals, diagnostics and self-protection (health, metrics, feature flags, remediation). Security by design: JWT + token versioning, rate limiting, role-restricted audit/diagnostics, structured logging with secret redaction. Demonstrates senior-level backend architecture, security-first thinking, and operational maturity beyond CRUD.
excerpt: LedgerX is a finance management application developed by Ancel Ajanga. PostgreSQL financial correctness and multi-tenant isolation power this production-grade platform for invoicing, payments, double-entry accounting, audit, fraud detection, and diagnostics.

title: OpsFlow - Incident & Operations Management Platform
displayTitle: OpsFlow: When Incidents Hit, the System Already Knows
description: OpsFlow is a business and operations application developed by Ancel Ajanga. AI-driven anomaly detection and failure-aware automation in a production-ready incident platform. Dual-database (PostgreSQL + MongoDB), real-time WebSockets, team-based multi-tenancy, 50+ API endpoints.
longDescription: Production-ready incident platform: dual-database (PostgreSQL + MongoDB), WebSockets, team-based multi-tenancy, 50+ API endpoints, NestJS, Next.js, RBAC, JWT.
impactMetric: 50+ API endpoints, real-time incident updates, secure multi-tenant isolation.
problemSummary: incident response and operations management with real-time visibility.
detailedDescription: OpsFlow is a production-ready incident and operations management platform architected for engineering teams, combining incident response, workflow management, task coordination, and knowledge sharing into a single secure team-based system. The platform features dual-database architecture (PostgreSQL + MongoDB), real-time WebSocket updates, and team-based multi-tenancy with 50+ API endpoints. The system follows a dual-database architecture: PostgreSQL (via Prisma ORM) for structured relational data (incidents, workflows, teams) and MongoDB for append-only event logs and timelines. The backend uses NestJS modular architecture with feature-based modules. Real-time updates are handled through WebSocket connections (Socket.IO) without background workers, computing SLA calculations and breach detection on-demand during API requests. Multi-tenant isolation is enforced at the database query level with team-scoped filtering.
outcomes: Production-ready system with 50+ API endpoints and real-time incident updates without paid infrastructure. Secure team-based multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation, fully documented setup and deployment guides, and responsive UI across mobile, tablet, and desktop. Demonstrates enterprise-grade backend and system design skills with real-world SaaS architecture. Vision includes scaling to 1,000+ teams through PostgreSQL read replicas, Redis pub-sub for WebSocket message distribution, and microservices extraction.
excerpt: OpsFlow is a business and operations application developed by Ancel Ajanga. AI-driven anomaly detection and failure-aware automation in a production-ready incident platform. Dual-database (PostgreSQL + MongoDB), real-time WebSockets, team-based multi-tenancy, 50+ API endpoints.

title: SignFlow - Real-Time Sign Language Translation Platform
displayTitle: SignFlow: Real-Time Sign Language, Zero Latency
description: SignFlow is an accessibility application developed by Ancel Ajanga. A high-fidelity assistive technology platform for real-time sign language translation with WebSocket streaming, 3D avatar simulation, and WCAG-compliant accessibility-first design.
longDescription: High-fidelity assistive platform: real-time sign language translation, WebSocket streaming, 3D avatar (Three.js/React Three Fiber), WCAG compliance, React/Node/MongoDB. Emphasizes frontend architecture, responsive design, smooth animations, and performance optimization for a premium user experience.
impactMetric: Real-time WebSocket streaming, 3D avatar simulation, full WCAG compliance.
problemSummary: real-time sign language translation and accessibility at scale.
detailedDescription: SignFlow is a high-fidelity assistive technology platform architected for real-time sign language translation, exploring the architectural requirements for scaling accessibility platforms. The system features WebSocket-powered streaming, 3D avatar simulation with natural variation, and accessibility-first design with WCAG compliance, demonstrating production-grade architecture for specialized user bases. The architecture follows a real-time streaming design: React frontend with Three.js (React Three Fiber) for 3D avatar rendering, Node.js/Express backend for translation processing, MongoDB Atlas for cloud-hosted data with indexed collections, and WebSocket connections for near-zero latency streaming. Animation pools store multiple variations per word/phrase, with seed-based selection for natural variation. Service isolation is achieved through separate layers: 3D rendering is isolated from translation processing, WebSocket connections are handled independently from REST API routes, and error handling is centralized with custom exception handlers.
outcomes: Fully implemented assistive technology prototype demonstrating real-time system design using WebSockets, scalable cloud architecture with MongoDB Atlas, intentional UX for specialized user bases, and product-level thinking bridging coding projects and viable market solutions. Features high-fidelity 3D avatar simulation, natural variation in animations, comprehensive analytics dashboard, and full WCAG accessibility compliance. Vision includes scaling to 10,000+ concurrent users through WebSocket load balancing, Redis for session management, and CDN integration for 3D assets.
excerpt: SignFlow is an accessibility application developed by Ancel Ajanga. A high-fidelity assistive technology platform for real-time sign language translation with WebSocket streaming, 3D avatar simulation, and WCAG-compliant accessibility-first design.

title: EduManage - Multi-Tenant School Management SaaS
displayTitle: EduManage: One Platform, Many Schools, Zero Leaks
description: EduManage is an education application developed by Ancel Ajanga. Multi-tenant isolation and hierarchical RBAC enable multiple institutions on one platform. Failure-aware Express/NestJS backend with tenant-scoped access and Socket.io real-time events.
longDescription: Multi-tenant school SaaS: tenant-scoped data, hierarchical RBAC, NestJS/Express, MongoDB, JWT, Socket.io real-time events, Dockerized deployment.
impactMetric: Multi-tenant MVP with tenant-scoped access and failure-aware boundaries.
problemSummary: running multiple institutions on one platform with strict tenant isolation.
detailedDescription: EduManage solves the hard problem most school systems avoid: running multiple institutions on one platform with strict tenant isolation and complex permissions. The architecture uses a multi-tenant Express/NestJS backend with tenant-scoped access at the data layer, MongoDB for flexible academic domain models, JWT-based stateless authentication with hierarchical RBAC, and Socket.io for real-time events (notifications and updates). The system is designed for graceful degradation under partial failures and is supported by a Dockerized development/deployment workflow. Status: MVP Complete (~85%). Planned but deferred for the next hardening phase: advanced rate limiting, deep automated testing, and caching.
outcomes: Multi-tenant MVP structured for scale: tenant-scoped access, hierarchical permissions, real-time events, and failure-aware service boundaries. Remaining work focuses on hardening (rate limiting, testing, caching) rather than redesigning core architecture.
excerpt: EduManage is an education application developed by Ancel Ajanga. Multi-tenant isolation and hierarchical RBAC enable multiple institutions on one platform. Failure-aware Express/NestJS backend with tenant-scoped access and Socket.io real-time events.

title: Fits by Aliv — Kenya-First E-Commerce Marketplace
displayTitle: Fits by Aliv: E-Commerce That Never Oversells
description: Fits by Aliv is a full-stack e-commerce application developed by Ancel Ajanga: a Kenya-first marketplace for thrift and sustainable fashion. Production-grade checkout with M-Pesa STK Push, vouchers, and VAT/WHT; soft inventory reservations and verified payment reconciliation prevent oversell and double-spend.
longDescription: Kenya-first e-commerce: NestJS, PostgreSQL (Prisma), Redis, BullMQ, Flutter, M-Pesa STK Push, vouchers, VAT/WHT, soft inventory reservations, verified reconciliation, AI-assisted self-healing jobs. Emphasizes frontend architecture, responsive design, smooth animations, and performance optimization for a premium user experience.
impactMetric: No oversell, no voucher double-spend, no blind trust in payment callbacks.
problemSummary: production-grade checkout and inventory integrity for Kenya marketplaces.
featureList: M-Pesa STK Push with verified reconciliation
detailedDescription: Fits by Aliv is a production-grade e-commerce marketplace (thrift/sustainable fashion) for the Kenyan market. The system supports product catalog, cart, checkout, M-Pesa STK Push payments, vouchers, referrals, tax (VAT/WHT), inventory reservations, and admin operations. Backend is NestJS with PostgreSQL (Prisma); clients are Flutter (mobile, web, desktop). Identity is Firebase Auth; payments are M-Pesa via Safaricom Daraja API. The system is designed around failure, abuse, and latency as first-class concerns: soft inventory reservations, idempotent order creation, verified payment reconciliation (STK Query before state changes), and AI-assisted self-healing background jobs (BullMQ). No inventory oversell, no voucher double-spend, no blind trust in callbacks.
outcomes: Production-grade Kenya-first e-commerce: payment-safe workflows, inventory self-healing, hardened security. Guarantees: no inventory oversell, no voucher double-spend, no unaudited state changes, no blind trust in payment callbacks. ~90–95% complete; remaining work is operational, not architectural.
excerpt: Fits by Aliv is a full-stack e-commerce application developed by Ancel Ajanga: a Kenya-first marketplace for thrift and sustainable fashion. Production-grade checkout with M-Pesa STK Push, vouchers, and VAT/WHT; soft inventory reservations and verified payment reconciliation prevent oversell and double-spend.

title: Inkly — Secure, High-Availability Messaging Architecture
displayTitle: Inkly: Privacy-First Messaging with Horizontal Scaling and Sacred Bond Encryption
description: Inkly is a production-grade secure messaging platform engineered for zero-knowledge privacy, horizontally scalable WebSockets, and resilient synchronization across unreliable networks.
longDescription: Inkly is a high-availability messaging architecture built to bridge the gap between privacy and performance. At its core, the platform implements a Zero-Knowledge 'Sacred Bond' cryptographic lifecycle (X25519/HKDF), ensuring message content is never accessible to the server. The backend is architected for horizontal scalability using a Redis-backed WebSocket adapter, allowing real-time delivery across distributed nodes with <100ms latency. Data integrity is maintained via a three-tier storage strategy: PostgreSQL for authoritative vault state, MongoDB for high-volume message persistence, and Redis for distributed locking and rate-limiting. Resilience is built-in through circuit breakers and bulkheads, ensuring critical messaging paths remain operational even when non-critical services fail. Developed by Ancel Ajanga.
impactMetric: 99.9% availability design, Zero-Knowledge privacy, 10k+ concurrent connections, and <100ms message delivery.
problemSummary: Securing real-time communication at scale while maintaining a zero-knowledge security model and resilience under failure.
featureList: Horizontal WebSocket scaling via Redis Pub/Sub
Hybrid Realtime Recovery with offline queueing
Circuit breakers and bulkhead pattern isolation
Cold storage streaming and secure seal/vacuum lifecycle
Structured logging (Pino) and Trace ID propagation (UUID v7)
Horizontal adapter for distributed message delivery
Real-time state synchronization for low-connectivity environments
detailedDescription: Deep dive into Inkly's production-grade architecture: Zero-Knowledge encryption, horizontal WebSocket scaling, and a resilient storage model designed for high-availability messaging.
outcomes: Demonstrated horizontal scale and cryptographic integrity in a distributed messaging environment with a focus on privacy and resilience.
excerpt: Inkly is a high-availability secure messaging platform engineered for zero-knowledge privacy and horizontal scalability. Built with Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis; clients are Flutter-based.
